name: Quick Chicken and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice, onion, green pepper, and water in a non-stick, 1-quart casserole or line the casserole dish with aluminum foil.
2. Place halved chicken breasts on top of the rice mixture.
3. Sprinkle with pepper and garlic powder.
4. Bake covered at 350 degrees F for 45 minutes to 1 hour until rice absorbs all water.
(314 calories per serving) 1 serving=1/2 Vegetable exchange 2 Bread exchanges 3 Lean Meat exchanges
